'''Deck 69''' was the 69th level of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]]. It contained the [[Hard Heart Cantina/Legends|Hard Heart Cantina]] and a female clothes shop within the [[Sector N-One/Legends|Sector N-One]] area.<ref name="Death Star">[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]</ref> It was destroyed along with the rest of the Death Star during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].
